message:
🐛 Check io.ReadAll and io.Copy errors across all Go handlers (#1947)

Fix ~20 locations where io.ReadAll/io.Copy errors were silently
ignored. Success-path reads now return proper HTTP errors; error-path
reads use a fallback message instead of empty/partial data.

Fixes #1909

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
